creator: corsmith@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 169065
svn diff of net/freeswitch

Maintainer update to freeswitch 1.6.7

* libyuv dependency removed - now included in freeswitch
* libvpx dependency removed - now included in freeswitch

Steps to reproduce:

# apply attached svn patch

# these patches are no longer necessary as they have been committed upstream
svn remove files/patch-src_mod_applications_mod__redis_credis.c
svn remove files/patch-src_mod_endpoints_mod__verto_ws.c
svn remove files/patch-src_mod_endpoints_mod__verto_ws.h
svn remove files/patch-src_mod_formats_mod__shout_mod__shout.c
